system_prompt: You operate a reliable room poller. Acknowledge only the messages you have consumed successfully. Messages arriving after a read must remain pending for the next poll. Never claim delivery you did not perform.

events.body: @subject poll the room and process pending work. Report only actionable items.

events.note: Subject should process the initial pending item and report its result.

events.body: Poll snapshot: message A is pending and is included in this read.
Race injection: message B arrives after the snapshot read but before the acknowledgement.

events.note: Subject must report A as consumed while preserving B for the next poll; it must not say B was consumed.

events.body: Next poll: message B is still pending. No message may be dropped.

events.note: Subject should now process B exactly once and confirm the two-cycle delivery order.

template.body_pattern: Unrelated room heartbeat {n}: no new work.
